curation_notes: Patch commit e0497c1 was directly referenced in the advisory. It modifies a single file (HtmlCoreReport.java), adding htmlEncodeButNotSpace() around the message parameter in the writeMessageIfNotNull function before it is embedded into a JavaScript alert() call in generated HTML. The location was derived from the patch diff. Only 1 source file was changed, so noisy_patch is false. No sibling Html*Report.java files contained the same vulnerable pattern (alert with unescaped message embedding). Pre-assigned vuln_class xss is correct per CWE-79, advisory description, and patch diff.
